title: Pink Mosaic Glass Vase, Modern Home Decor for Bedroom, Kitchen, Living Room & Retail Spaces, Perfect for Wedding Centerpieces, Mediterranean Style Vase
features: Specifications: Mouth: 3.42", Bottle width: 5.43", Height: 8". This pink vase is an ideal container for fresh flowers. Use it to hold bouquets of flowers or display them on an entryway table as a stand-alone decorative piece.

TRADITIONAL HANDMADE: The flower vase is crafted from thick glass, with all mosaics on the bottle body hand-applied and fade-resistant. Please avoid cleaning the surface directly with water; gently wipe away dust using a well-wrung cloth.

MOSAIC DESIGN: This mosaic glass vase serves as a captivating and distinctive decorative element for any interior space. Ideal for enhancing living rooms, restaurant displays, fireplace mantels, bookshelf arrangements, coffee table styling, dining table settings, farmhouse interiors, or as an eye-catching centerpiece.
Home Decoration: Whether it is a modern minimalist style or a retro pastoral style, this glass vase can perfectly blend, adding a touch of warmth and elegance to your living room, bedroom or study.
Recommended to use: Clean the vase regularly to maintain its crystal clear texture. Avoid strong impact and extend service life.
description: Product Description Pink glass vase: Light up the artistic beauty of life Elegant design, mosaic decoration This pink glass vase is highlighted by unique mosaic decoration, each piece is carefully spliced ​​to present a delicate hand-crafted texture. The collision of pink and mosaics is both romantic and artistic, adding a touch of color to your home. Recommended usage: Match flowers or dried flowers to show different styles and atmospheres. Thickened glass: sturdy and durable. It is made of high-quality thickened glass, which not only improves the durability of the vase, but also gives it a calm texture. Whether it is used daily or as a decoration, it can last forever and accompany you through every wonderful moment. Put flowers inside, or use them as separate desktop decorations. Wide bottle mouth Can accommodate more than a dozen flowers The brightness of the sun Under the sunlight, the light reflects charming light and shadow through the glass, as if adding a layer of dream filter to your space Transparent bottom Easy to observe the roots of plants
